build.beforeDevCommand: lsof -ti :1421 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null; npm run dev -- --port 1421

security.csp: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-eval'; worker-src blob:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data: blob: asset: https://asset.localhost https: http:; media-src 'self' data: blob: https: http:
